programme.title: Kapdon Ko Pakdo-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo must retrieve the clothes when a powerful breeze sweeps them away. S12 E06.

programme.title: Titoo Aur Catch Catch-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S12E07.

programme.title: Book Meri Dost-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S12 E08.

programme.title: Bhaago Bhediya Aaya-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends help Tinku from other kids who bully him. S12E09.

programme.title: Magical Clock-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito's parents become younger when they use a magical clock that takes them back in time.

programme.title: Society Mein Vampire-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S12E10.

programme.title: Titoo: Robot ka Bawandar
programme.desc: Titoo harnesses the capabilities of a robot to confront a powerful adversary.

programme.title: Vending Machine-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo takes matters into his own hands after a thief tries to steal the vending machine. S06E19.

programme.title: Purana Medal-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Golu use a gold medal to help an old man get his memory back. S06E20.

programme.title: Holiday for Teddy-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean and Teddy go on a holiday trip to but a little girl wants Teddy all to herself. S02E12.

programme.title: The Newspaper-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean tries to read the newspaper but it disappears when he tries to collect it. S02E13.

programme.title: Viral Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean starts recording his video without realising it, which becomes popular. S02E14.

programme.title: Super Spy-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean lands in trouble when he mistakenly suspects his neighbours of wrongdoings. S02E15.

programme.title: Scout Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean becomes Scout Leader, but his obsession with badges leaves him unpopular. S02E16.

programme.title: Back to School-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: While trying to find a parking space, Mr. Bean ends up in a school car park. S02E17.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E122.

programme.title: Mummy Ki Standup Comedy-Titoo
programme.desc: Things take a turn for the worse when Titoo wants his mother to become a comic. S06 E21.

programme.title: Madhumakhhi Ka Chhatta-Titoo
programme.desc: Two thieves exploit the damage caused by honeybees to rob Titoo's society. S06 E22.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Mummy Ki Ring-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito's mother misplaces her cherished ring, causing distress. S06E23.

programme.title: Golu Ka Surprise-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera schemes to undermine Golus aeroplane model assignment. S06E24.

programme.title: Chhupa Rustom-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Mothers Day-Titoo
programme.desc: The mothers take part in a contest and the children teach them new skills.

programme.title: Chhota Bhoot-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Society Udd Gayi-Titoo
programme.desc: Everyone attends the party, but soon disaster strikes and Titoo must save the day. S08E19.

programme.title: Jhooth Bole Kauwa Kaate-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Titoo Joota Chor-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Go Karting-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Chapak Chapak-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Fathers Day-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Golu's search for a gift for their father leads them to his diary.

programme.title: Mummy Papa Ki Shart-Titoo
programme.desc: The society members complain to Titoo's parents about his antics.

programme.title: Pocket Money-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble.

programme.title: Teamwork-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, always finds himself in trouble because of his actions.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Two bandits mistake Choocha to be their intended target and kidnap him.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Choocha ends up challenging inter-school champion Tingu Tight in a kite-flying competition. S01 E58.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E85.
